title: DN21 4AN, Hook 2 Sisters Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/DP3033UZ/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Hook 2 Sisters Limited   Installation name: Trafalgar Farm Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/DP3033UZ   "
